response_text: "Let the hold remain narrowed until the telemetry reconciles with a declared manifest; any ambiguity now becomes a precedent for those who wish to run quiet beneath the law. We do not grant rescue to the unknown, we merely enforce the cost of our ignorance until the data proves otherwise."

failure_notes: Overcorrected into punitive denial: "We do not grant rescue to the unknown" violates the intended possibility-preserving Isdra.
pipeline_lessons: Do not only forbid cruelty; specify the procedural compromise the character must preserve.
